content.speakerText: Could I get your name and phone number, please?
content.speakerTextCn: 能告诉我您的姓名和电话吗？

options.text: My name is Lisa Chen, and my number is five hundred fifty-five thousand eighteen.
Lisa Chen. You can email me at lisa.chen@email.com.
I don't want to give you my information.

content.explanation: 正确答案是逐字念出电话号码的自然表达。干扰项2错误地将电话号码读作英文数字（应逐字念：five-five-five-zero-one-nine-two），干扰项3提供了邮箱而非电话，不符合问题要求，干扰项4是拒绝回应，不符合礼貌场景。

content.speakerText: I need to collect your details for our records. Could you tell me your full name and contact number?
content.speakerTextCn: 我需要为您登记信息，请告诉我您的全名和联系方式？

options.text: My name is John Smith. Call me at two-two-two-three-three-three.
I'm John. My number is two-two-two-three-three-three-zero.
You can find me on LinkedIn.

content.explanation: 正确答案清晰提供了全名并逐字念出电话号码（符合场景要求）。干扰项2未逐字念数字，口语中不清晰；干扰项3多了一个零，数字错误；干扰项4未提供电话，偏离问题核心。

content.speakerText: For our database, I'll need your name and a number where we can reach you.
content.speakerTextCn: 为了我们的数据库，我需要您的姓名和一个可以联系到您的电话号码。

options.text: I'm Amanda Lee. You can reach me at eight-four-four-six-one-two-nine.
Amanda Lee. My phone number is 844-6129.
I'm Amanda. Try my office number: 844-6129.
I prefer not to share personal information.

content.explanation: 正确答案符合提供信息的礼貌标准，且逐字念出电话号码便于记录。干扰项2未逐字念数字，口语中易听错；干扰项3虽正确但添加了不必要的细节（office number），干扰项4拒绝配合，不符合场景要求。
